channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NPS Confirms Safety Measures Amid Nationwide PSV Strike Over Rising Fuel Prices
item.description: Nairobi — The National Police Service (NPS) has reassured Kenyans of their safety as a planned nationwide public transport strike began on Monday. The strike, organised by a minority of matatu operato...

item.title: Minnesota ICE Agent Faces Felony Charges for Shooting Venezuelan Immigrant
item.description: Minnesota prosecutors have issued a warrant for the arrest of a U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agent who allegedly shot a Venezuelan immigrant during a federal enforcement operation in...

item.title: Shehu Sani Supporters Turn Out Massively for APC Primaries in Kaduna Central Despite Intimidation
item.description: Despite some intimidation and destruction of campaign posters by opponents, supporters of former Kaduna Central Senator Shehu Sani came out in very large numbers on Monday across the seven local gover...

item.title: Ontario Tech University sues YouTuber over unauthorized pranks on campus
item.description: Ontario Tech University has launched legal action against YouTube content creator Fique Ayub Fique and his associates for filming pranks on campus without permission. The pranks included Ayub using an...

item.title: Global Companies Face Rising Costs as Conflict in Iran Disrupts Trade and Energy Markets
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the U.S., Israel, and Iran has already imposed at least US$25-billion in costs on global companies, a figure that continues to grow. According to a Reuters analysis of cor...

item.title: African Swine Fever Suspected in Multiple Pig Deaths in Gqeberha
item.description: Over the past week, residents in the Grogro community near Sherwood, on the outskirts of Gqeberha, have reported finding the carcasses of roughly a dozen pigs. Initial concerns included poisoning or d...

item.title: The Avalanches to Host Complimentary London Event Celebrating New Song
item.description: Australian group The Avalanches have revealed plans for a surprise, free event in London later this week. This one-off show, taking place at OM in East London on Thursday 21st May from 8pm until midni...

item.title: Quebec Strengthens Partnership with France in Critical Minerals and Technology
item.description: During an official visit to France, Quebec Premier Christine Fréchette met with French President Emmanuel Macron at the Élysée Palace and French Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu at Matignon to discuss...

item.title: Sibanyoni’s Extortion Case Removed from Court Roll After Prosecutor’s No-Show
item.description: The extortion and money laundering case against Mpumalanga taxi boss Joe “Ferrari” Sibanyoni and his co-accused has been removed from the court roll after the prosecutor failed to appear for a schedul...

item.title: Tanzania urged to honour late Ambassador Juma Mwapachu for his outstanding writings on national development
item.description: It has been just over one year since Ambassador Juma Volter Mwapachu, popularly known as JV, was laid to rest in Pande Village, Tanga Region. A remembrance event held on 19th April brought together pe...

item.title: Ram Charan Headlines 'Peddi' as an Athlete Standing Up for Justice
item.description: The trailer for 'Peddi', directed by Buchi Babu Sana, has been released, featuring Ram Charan in the lead role as a rural athlete who confronts social injustice in his village. The film brings togethe...

item.title: Governor Dapo Abiodun Emerges APC Candidate for Ogun East Senatorial District as Deputy Governor Steps Aside in Ogun West
item.description: Governor Dapo Abiodun of Ogun State has successfully won the All Progressives Congress (APC) primary election for the Ogun East Senatorial District. The primary took place on Monday and Abiodun scored...

item.title: Home Minister Attributes High Petrol and Diesel Prices in Andhra Pradesh to YSRCP Tax Policies
item.description: Andhra Pradesh Home Minister Vangalapudi Anitha has attributed the high petrol and diesel prices in the state to the previous YSR Congress Party (YSRCP) government. In a social media post, she explain...

item.title: Former Lawmaker Criticizes Trump's Handling of Iran Conflict and Its Impact on U.S. Strategy
item.description: Former Representative Adam Kinzinger, a Republican from Illinois and outspoken critic of former President Donald Trump, criticized Trump's handling of the ongoing military situation with Iran. Followi...

item.title: How Digital Gifting on TikTok Can Be Exploited for Money Laundering in Pakistan
item.description: Social media platforms like TikTok have inadvertently created a new channel for moving money beyond the reach of traditional financial oversight in Pakistan. Through likes, gifts, and livestream donat...

item.title: Kenyan Company Turns Sugarcane Bagasse into Compostable Food Packaging
item.description: In western Kenya, after sugarcane is crushed to extract juice, plenty of bagasse waste is left behind at the mills. Normally this fibrous residue is burned or dumped, but one innovative firm in Nairob...

item.title: LPG Companies Expand as Tanzania Shifts to Clean Cooking
item.description: Tanzania inayoendelea push ya clean cooking imeanza kubadilisha soko la LPG kwa nguvu. Serikali inataka angalau asilimia 80 ya Watanzania watumie clean cooking energy ifikapo 2034, na hadi sasa adopti...

item.title: Exploring the Curious Life of Australia's Echidna
item.description: In his article, John Hanscombe paints a vivid picture of encounters with Australia's unique wildlife, particularly the echidna, through observations on morning walks. He reflects on how early European...

item.title: Andy Burnham Signals Leadership Ambitions with Makerfield Byelection Bid
item.description: Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham has set out a direct challenge to Labour leader Keir Starmer, stating he would 'change Labour' if elected. Burnham, expected to stand in the upcoming Makerfield b...

item.title: Twisha Sharma's death under investigation: CCTV footage shows final moments, husband absconding
item.description: In Bhopal, a CCTV video has emerged showing the last movements of Twisha Sharma, a 33-year-old woman from Noida, before she was found dead at her marital home in Katara Hills. The footage shows her wa...
